description.unified: Deals Magic DMG to enemies in a frontal area 3 times, pushing them back, and reduces their ATK Spd by [250->15%] and Magic DEF by [30%->10%] for [15->4]sec. Against non-hero enemies, each hit deals additional Magic DMG.
Deals Magic DMG to 2 enemy and inflicts Bind for [6->2]sec. The damaged enemy takes Magic DoT every 0.5sec for 6sec, and Magic DMG taken is increased by [30%->20%].
Pulls enemies within range toward the center and deals Magic DMG 5 times. The final hit stuns enemies for [3->1]sec. Against non-hero enemies, deals additional Magic DMG.

Increases Critical Hit Chance by 150. Each time damage is dealt, applies [Lea's Curse] to the target for 10sec. [Lea's Curse]: Critical Hit Chance is reduced by [250->100], and ATK is reduced by [25%->10%].

light.unified: Mana cost increases by 1000, but damage increases by 100%. [DMG 40%->(removed)]

dark.unified: Roots the target for [20% chance of 3 sec shackle->1] sec.

light.unified: Mana cost increases by [1->2000], but the target is changed to [3 enemies->all enemies].
Increases the target’s Magic DMG taken by [25%->15%] for 10 sec.

dark.unified: Mana cost is increased by 1000, but damage dealt is increased by 100%. [Mana cost reduced by 1->(removed)]

light.unified: For each enemy affected by [Lea's Curse], your Attack increases by 10%. This effect stacks up to 5 times and cannot be dispelled.

dark.unified: Reduces the target’s Magic Critical Resistance by [25%->20%] for 10 sec.

description.unified: [Claw of Restriction] Increases DMG by 50% and increases M.Weakness of the affected enemy by {0}% for 10 sec.
[Area of Darkness] increases DMG by {0}%, and its last attack reduces the target’s M.DEF by [P.DEF and M.DEF by 30%->30%] for 7 sec.

[Black Wind] Attacks enemies inflicted with [Curse of Lea] every 10 sec, dealing M.DMG equal to 200% of ATK, and increasing own ATK by {0}% for 20 sec per hit enemy. This effect can be stacked up to max 10 times.

dark.unified: On critical hit, reduces the target’s Status Resistance by [250->200] for 10 sec, and reduces the cooldown of all skills except the skill in use by 2%.

description.unified: Upon a Critical Hit, reduces target's Healing Rate by [50%->35%] for 10 sec and increases own Critical Damage by {0}%. The Critical Damage increase effect stacks up to 20 times.
